name: Fitsume Teshome
alt: Maps of Kling-Gupta Efficiency (KGE) for streamflow simulations across the contiguous United States, comparing five meteorological forcing datasets: CPC, GRIDMET, W5E5, EWEMBI, and WFDEI.
caption: Kling-Gupta Efficiency (KGE) of streamflow simulations across CONUS gauges (1979–2016) under five meteorological forcing datasets — CPC, GRIDMET, W5E5, EWEMBI, and WFDEI.
citation: Teshome, F. et al. Journal of Hydrology.

name: Mahlet Melaku
alt: Adsorption kinetics and isotherm plots for PFOA, PFOS, PFBA, and PFBS on activated carbon, including pseudo-first/second-order kinetic fits, intraparticle diffusion, and Langmuir/Freundlich isotherms.
caption: Adsorption kinetics and isotherm modeling of PFAS compounds (PFOA, PFOS, PFBA, PFBS) on biomass-derived activated carbon.
citation: Melaku, M. et al. ACS ES&T Water.

name: Betelhem Wondimneh Demeke
alt: Sankey diagrams showing the green and blue water footprint of global crop production by crop group and end use, comparing 1972 and 2018.
caption: Green and blue water footprint of global crop production, by crop group and end use, comparing 1972 and 2018.

name: Habtamu Tamiru
alt: Scatter plots showing deviations of calibrated and machine-learning-adjusted evaporative index from the Budyko curve across six different Budyko parameterizations.
caption: Deviations of SCE-calibrated and machine-learning-adjusted evaporative index from the Budyko curve, across six parameterizations.
